description_long: This is a small, short-haired dog with a compact and muscular build, featuring a predominantly white coat with large brown patches on its head, back, and sides. The dog's face is expressive, with a brown mask covering the eyes and ears, and a white blaze running down the center of the snout. Its ears are triangular and set high, folding forward in a button style. The tail is medium-length, thick at the base, and carried upright with a slight curve. The legs are sturdy and proportionate, with white fur extending from the paws up to the shoulders and thighs. The overall appearance is lively and alert, typical of a Jack Russell Terrier.
description: A small, muscular dog with a white coat and brown patches, upright tail, and button ears, resembling a Jack Russell Terrier. Its expressive face and compact build give it an alert and energetic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's symmetrical face, brown mask, white snout, and button ears folded forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's brown patch over the shoulder, white legs, and upright tail with a slight curve.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dog's back, brown fur with a white stripe down the spine, and the tail carried upright.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the brown patch on the shoulder, white legs, and the dog's alert posture.
